subcodes.first_line: O Thou through Whose Name the world hath been ennobled! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name to send down from the heaven of Thy loving-kindness upon him who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من باسمک تشرف العالم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم ان تنزل من سماء عنایتک علی من
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
